titleStmt.title: SII 9.147: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 147. (A.R. No. 430 of 1923.) ON A RED STONE LYING IN FRONT OF THE SHRINE TO THE SOUTH OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF SANGAMESVARA AT SANGAMESVARA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 3, Siddhārthi, • • • pāḍiva, Bṛihaspativāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti probably corresponding to A.D. 1079 December 26 Thursday and refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvana-Malladēva. It records that, while his feudatory, Bijjaṇa-Chōḷamahārāja, was ruling over Kanne three-hundred, Peḍakal eight-hundred and Naṟavāḍi five-hundred, from Ētagēri, he made a gift of land for the service of some god (name lost) and for education and that he had the Ādi[tya ?] temple constructed for the merit of his mother Sōmabbesāni.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśriyaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu tribhuvanama
lladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivirddhipravarddha
mānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire Ēta
gēriya nelevīḍinoḷu tatupādapadmōpajī
vi caraṇasarōruhavihataviḷōcanatri
ḷōcanapramukhākhiḷaprithvīsvarakāritakāvē
rītīra kalikālakularatnapradīpaka kumararāṁkusa A
yyanasiṁha kāṁcīpuratripurakāraṇamahēsvara
śrīmatu bijjaṇacōḷamahārājaṁ kanne munnū
ṟuma peḍakaleṁṭunūṟumaṁ naṟavāḍi Aynū
ṟumaṁ Intī mūṟu nāḍumaṁ duṣṭanigrahasiṣṭapra
tipāḷanaṁ māḍi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁge
yyuttamire mōrakhaṇḍiya dēvarēsvarada niraṁja
napaṇḍitara śiṣyaru yamaniyamasyādhyāyadhyāna
dhāraṇajapasamādhiṣaḍaṁgōpahārādisaṁpannaranē
katarkkādisāstrapārāvārapāragaravadātakīrttidhvaja
ramaḷinacaritrarappa śrīmatu Anantaśaktipaṇḍitadēvargge
cāḷukyavikramavarṣada mūṟeneya siddhārttisaṁvatsara
da śrāheyā ḍiva brihaspativāra
Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti da tatukālado
ḷ bijjaṇacōḷamahārāja nāyaka
naṁddiyaṇnanāyaṇaṁge sva
ramaṁ māḍisi Ā dēvālayada khaṇḍasphu rakkaṁ
dēvaraṁgabhōgakka(ṁ)malliya vidyādānakkaṁ
nara kappaḍakkaṁ kanne munnūṟa rvvā
bhyantarasiddhiyiṁ sāsanabaddhamāgi caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ sale
koṭṭaru . tammabbe sōmabbesānige puṇyamāge Ādi
gṛhamaṁ māḍisida .
Digital edition of SII 9.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
